name: Corn Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Frozen whole kernel corn (thawed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine all ingredients except the shredded carrot over low heat.
2. Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add the shredded carrot and let it cool before chilling in the refrigerator.
